query: Terrion Arnold Detroit Lions Commissioner's Exempt List released waived NFL transaction status July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding on the question:

**Terrion Arnold was NOT placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List.** The Detroit Lions instead chose to waive/release him outright in late June 2026 (announced Monday June 29, formally waived July 2) following his June 24 arrest on eight felony charges (armed robbery and kidnapping) tied to a February 2026 Tampa incident. 

Pro Football Rumors explicitly noted that while players facing criminal charges are sometimes placed on the Commissioner's Exempt List, "the Lions opted to part ways with Arnold" instead — a move that lets Detroit void his contract guarantees as "conduct detrimental to the team."

Other 31 teams had until **July 6, 2026 at 4:00 p.m. ET** to submit a waiver claim. A claiming team would owe ~$4.848M in remaining guarantees, a significant deterrent. His attorney says three teams have contacted him and he expects to sign "within 30 days," though his trial schedule effectively rules out him playing in 2026.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold's lawyer informs court he has been contacted by three teams
sources.snippet: Former first-round pick Terrion Arnold was officially waived on Wednesday. The other 31 teams have until 4:00 p.m. ET on Monday, July 6, to put in a claim for the balance of his contract.

sources.title: Lions Waive CB Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The Lions have waived cornerback Terrion Arnold, per a team announcement. Usually...players are placed on the commissioner's exempt list. But the Lions opted to part ways with Arnold.

sources.title: Lions release CB Terrion Arnold following recent arrest on eight felony charges
sources.snippet: The Detroit Lions announced on Monday they have released cornerback Terrion Arnold following his recent arrest on eight felony charges in connection with a February robbery and kidnapping in Tampa, Florida.

sources.title: Lions release Terrion Arnold after CB's arrest on felony charges
Former Lion Terrion Arnold contacted by 3 NFL teams after team release: attorney
sources.snippet: Former Detroit Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold has been contacted by three NFL teams just days after being released from the Lions.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold lawyer claims three NFL teams contacted former Lions CB
sources.snippet: Arnold expects to sign with an NFL team 'within 30 days' and that three teams have already contacted him since the Lions released him.

sources.title: Former Detroit Lions CB Terrion Arnold released from jail after posting $1M bond
sources.snippet: Arnold, 23, was released at 3:09 p.m. Tuesday (June 30), six days after he was booked into custody on June 24.

sources.title: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold could sign with a new team soon, but don't expect him to play
sources.snippet: Arnold could land a new NFL contract within a month, but the courtroom schedule guarantees he will not play football in 2026.

sources.title: Why the Detroit Lions cut Terrion Arnold now
sources.snippet: On Monday, hours after a Florida judge set Terrion Arnold's bond at $1 million, the Detroit Lions cut ties with the 23-year-old cornerback.
